## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Validation
- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Additional verification noted below (if needed)

## Risk + Rollback
- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Review Readiness
- [ ] Docs updated for behavior/process changes
- [ ] Follows ownership expectations in `docs/engineering-operating-baseline.md`
- [ ] Ready for reviewer response within 1 business day
